title: Warhammer Quest - Take a Look - Part Three - The Treasure and Event cards
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l4OOeF2yo9Y

Daniel (@dungeondive) realises he forgot something — the treasure and event cards didn't get their due in the base game overview. Part Three corrects that oversight, diving into the card systems that drive moment-to-moment gameplay: what you find, what finds you, and the random encounters that make each dungeon run unpredictable.

The treasure and event decks are where Warhammer Quest's personality lives. Magic items, wandering monsters, unexpected windfalls and catastrophes — it's all in the cards, and Daniel walks through what makes this system tick.

----

Treasure or events — which random element do you enjoy more in dungeon crawlers?
